name: Alexandria Governorate (Egypt)

colors.symbolism: the Mediterranean Sea, which has defined Alexandria's character since its founding
the lighthouse and other emblems of the city's heritage

description: A light blue field charged in the centre with a white stylised representation of the Lighthouse of Alexandria.
history: The flag of Alexandria Governorate features the ancient Pharos lighthouse — one of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World — set on a Mediterranean-blue field, recalling both the city's classical heritage and its identity as Egypt's principal seaport.

features.symbolism: the Mediterranean Sea on which Alexandria lies
the ancient Pharos of Alexandria, one of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World, the city's defining historical landmark
